tasks.label: 🟢 Neyrlo: korjaa Node-versio
tasks.command: bash -lc 'export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm install 20.19.4 && nvm use 20.19.4 && node -v && npm -v'

tasks.label: 📦 Neyrlo: asenna paketit
tasks.command: bash -lc 'export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 20.19.4 || nvm install 20.19.4; npm install && npx expo install --fix'

tasks.label: 🚀 Neyrlo: käynnistä Expo Go
tasks.command: bash -lc 'export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 20.19.4 || nvm install 20.19.4; npm run start:expo-go'

tasks.label: 🌐 Neyrlo: käynnistä web-esikatselu
tasks.command: bash -lc 'export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 20.19.4 || nvm install 20.19.4; npm run web'

tasks.label: ✅ Neyrlo: tarkista TypeScript
tasks.command: bash -lc 'export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 20.19.4 || nvm install 20.19.4; npm run typecheck'
